title: Kohlhiesel's Daughters
actors: Henny Porten, Emil Jannings, Jakob Tiedtke
plot: In Southern Bavaria, Xaver wants to marry Gretel, but her father Kohlhiesel insists his elder daughter Liesel marry first. Liesel is shunned as too brutal. Seppel suggests marrying Liesel first, ridding her, then wedding Gretel.
